# High Signal

> Daily synthesized brief on technology, startups, and finance. Five sections with inline hit-rates on market calls, regional filter, no signup required.

Free product. Lab data and ingest pipelines feed a composed brief at `/` and `/brief`. Public track record at `/track-record`.

## Product

- [Daily brief](https://highsignal.app/): Primary surface — five-section composed brief
- [Brief (alias)](https://highsignal.app/brief): Same brief composer
- [Track record](https://highsignal.app/track-record): Public hit-rate ledger on signal types
- [Methodology](https://highsignal.app/methodology): How signals are sourced, scored, and backtested
- [About](https://highsignal.app/about): Product scope and data sources
- [Privacy](https://highsignal.app/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://highsignal.app/terms): Terms of use

## Lenses (deep views)

- [Markets](https://highsignal.app/markets): Market signals and spillover graph
- [Communities](https://highsignal.app/communities): Reddit/community digest
- [Signals today](https://highsignal.app/signals/today): Published signal cards
- [Opportunities](https://highsignal.app/opportunities): Product opportunity surfacing

## Feeds

- [Signals RSS](https://highsignal.app/signals/rss): Published signals feed
- [Digest RSS](https://highsignal.app/digest/rss): Weekly digest feed

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/sarthak-fleet/high-signal): Source
- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Fleet context
